name: Feature Implementer Skill Eval Suite
description: Tests the feature-implementer skill's ability to build new functionality

cases.name: add-version-flag
cases.task: Add a --version flag to the CLI (bin/omni.js) that prints the version from package.json and exits. Should work as both 'omni --version' and 'omni -v'.
cases.judgePrompt: Rate this feature implementation from 0 to 10. A good implementation should: (1) read the version from package.json, (2) handle both --version and -v flags, (3) exit cleanly after printing. Deduct for not integrating with the existing CLI structure.

cases.name: add-config-file
cases.task: Add support for a .omnirc.json config file in the project root that can set default agent preferences (preferredAgent: 'claude' | 'codex') and custom aliases for routes.
cases.judgePrompt: Rate this feature implementation from 0 to 10. It should: (1) define a clear config schema, (2) load the file on startup, (3) use defaults when the file is missing, (4) integrate with the existing routing system.
